title: App Settings - General - Licenses - License Link (MIT,Apache2.0.....)
scenario: License details display correctly with headline, description, and Cancel (X) button when tapping each license link in App Settings > General > Licenses
steps: Tap each license link (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.)
Verify the license details screen shows a headline
Verify the license details screen shows a description
Verify a Cancel (X) button is present in the upper right corner
Go to Poly Lens (or Apps > Poly Lens)
Verify the same licenses are listed
expected: Tapping each license link displays a details screen with a headline, description, and a Cancel (X) button in the upper right corner. The same licenses are also visible in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
